title: Add visual padding to back 2D area overlays
description: 2D area overlays now give back layers slightly wider visual padding so zone remains visibly behind boundary and subgraph.
decision_notes: Kept the established render order of layer, zone, boundary, subgraph.
Added SVG-only visual outsets so zone is expanded more than boundary, while subgraph remains the front grouping surface.
The correction is applied at area box assembly time so routing and model layout coordinates are not perturbed.
